title: roldana nesomiorum
intro: Roldana nesomiorum, also known as Nesom's roldana, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Roldana nesomiorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
